arts.ttl: Saturday's Ligue 1 predictions including Rennes vs. PSG
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Ligue 1 fixtures, including Rennes vs. Paris Saint-Germain.

arts.ttl: Man Utd and Tottenham Gain Major Edge as PSG Target Prefers Premier League
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain are increasingly looking to Ligue 1 for talent, having added players like Bradley Barcola and Ousmane Dembele over the past two summers. Could this trend continue with a third consecutive summer of strengthening from France’s top flight? Tuttosport recently reported that PSG are among the clubs eyeing Jonathan David. arts.ttl: Virgil Van Dijk Drops One-Word Description on What Liverpool Needed to Do Against PSG
arts.sum: Liverpool edged past Paris Saint-Germain with a 1-0 win Wednesday at Parc des Princes in the first leg of their UEFA Champions League Round of 16 matchup. Moreover, Virgil van Dijk summed up the challenge of facing the French giants in just one word. PSG had plenty of chances but couldn’t make them count. arts.ttl: Arne Slot Gives Major Injury Update on Liverpool Ace After Making Trip, Not Playing vs. PSG
arts.sum: Liverpool escaped with a 1-0 win over Paris Saint-Germain on Wednesday at Parc des Princes in the first leg of their UEFA Champions League Round of 16 tie. Moreover, the Reds secured the win without having Cody Gakpo, who made the trip to Paris but didn’t feature in the contest. arts.ttl: Man Utd Scouts Attended Liverpool-PSG to Scout Player Who’s Valued at Over €100M
arts.sum: Manchester United have reportedly set their sights on a Paris Saint-Germain player, and there’s so much interest that the Red Devils have already scouted him across two matches. The Parisians bring in quality young talent to fight for their minutes, but sometimes, it doesn’t work out for them. arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta Sees PSG Target Who Received New Offer From Barcelona as Vital to Midfield
arts.sum: Frenkie de Jong’s future at Barcelona is up in the air as he nears the final year of his contract. Amid interest from several European clubs, one Premier League team has placed him at the top of their wishlist. arts.ttl: Man Utd Alerted as Barcelona, PSG Eye €75M-Rated Star Who Wants to Leave Portuguese Giants
arts.sum: While Paris Saint-Germain loaned out Randal Kolo Muani to Juventus, the Frenchman will likely leave this summer, meaning the capital club could be in the market for a No. 9. arts.ttl: Bayern Munich, Real Madrid Have Major Interest in PSG, Tottenham Target Who Will Add More Youth
arts.sum: Last summer, Paris Saint-Germain expressed interest in Dean Huijsen as they aimed to strengthen their defense, but the Spanish center-back ultimately joined AFC Bournemouth. If PSG makes another move for him, they’ll face stiff competition. PSG bolstered their defense with Willian Pacho, but with Milan Skriniar likely to make his loan to Fenerbahçe permanent, they […] The post Bayern Munich, Real Madrid Have Major Interest in PSG, Tottenham Target Who Will Add More Youth appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Barcelona Have Two Reasons in Not Pursuing Juventus, PSG Transfer Target This Summer
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain have quality midfield talent, but one area where they’re lacking is height. Fabian Ruiz, at 6′ 2″ (1.89m), is the tallest player, and after him, there aren’t many options near his stature. Senny Mayulu stands at 6′ 0″ (1.83m), but the 18-year-old is one of the few players with a similar height. arts.ttl: Arne Slot insists Liverpool's clash with Southampton is their 'most important' in upcoming week of 'three finals' - with PSG and Newcastle ties looming
arts.sum: DOMINIC KING: Arne Slot has warned Liverpool 's players they face a week of three finals - and that Saturday's Anfield clash with Southampton is the most important of all.
